title: SRS Repository Manifest (ext:repository)
description: Root file for a SRS ext:repository. Acts as the authoritative index and entry point for the repository. Every repository must have exactly one manifest.json at its root.

srsVersion.description: SRS spec version this repository conforms to, e.g. '2.0' or '2.0-draft'.

repositoryId.description: Stable UUID for this repository. Never changes on copy or export.

namespace.description: Reverse-DNS namespace for this repository, e.g. 'com.semanticops.srs'.

declaredExtensions.description: SRS extensions this repository conforms to, e.g. ['ext:lifecycle', 'ext:views-l1', 'ext:views-l2'].

container.description: Embedded Container record. Canonical source of truth for this repository's identity.

containerIndex.description: Index of all Containers in this repository.

packageRef.description: Reference to the SRS Package that supplies field and type definitions (single package).

packageRefs.description: References to one or more SRS Packages that supply field and type definitions. Use instead of packageRef for multi-package and multi-version repositories (see RFC-014 Change C).

upstreamPackage.description: RFC-014 (ext:import-tracking). Top-level normative provenance stamp for a repository initialised from an upstream Package. Records the package identity, version, and install time. MUST be written at the top level (not inside meta) by conformant tools (R7). On read, tools MUST prefer this field and fall back to meta.upstreamPackage for pre-RFC-014 repositories (R9).

instanceIndex.description: Authoritative list of all instances in this repository. Files not listed here are not members.

relationsPath.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the relations collection file.

sourceDocumentsPath.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the source-documents/ directory.

sourceDocumentIndex.description: Optional explicit index of source documents.

relationsChecksums.description: Optional checksums for each relations file. Enables fast no-op detection during re-import.

changelogPath.description: ext:changelog only. Relative path from manifest.json to the ChangelogCollection file. Default: 'changelog/changelog.json'.

federationPath.description: ext:federation only. Path to the RepositoryRegistry file. Default: 'federation/registry.json'.

federationEventsPath.description: ext:federation only. Path to the FederationEventsFile. Default: 'federation/events.json'.

aiGuidance.description: Comprehension guidance for AI agents reading this repository.

meta.description: Implementation-local key-value pairs. Common keys: 'sourceOfTruth', 'renderedExports'. Cross-system keys should be namespaced. Note: upstreamPackage was previously accepted here; see manifest.upstreamPackage (RFC-014). Since meta permits additional properties, existing manifests remain schema-valid but conformant tools MUST NOT write meta.upstreamPackage.

upstreamPackage.description: DEPRECATED by RFC-014. Use the top-level 'upstreamPackage' field instead. Accepted as a read fallback during the transition window; implementations MUST write only the top-level field going forward.

renderedPresentations.description: RFC-015 [N+31]. Declared presentations for this repository. A conformant viewer selects the first entry with isDefault:true as the default; when none carry isDefault, the first entry is the default. When absent or empty, viewer falls back to implementation-defined selection.

containerType.description: Soft-deprecated hint (RFC-009). When rootInstanceIds is present, SHOULD equal the resolved root Type's name field (bare name, not namespace/name). A mismatch is diagnostic-only; the Container remains valid. See RFC-009 I-64.

identityInstanceId.description: RFC-013 / RFC-018. The instance id of the record that is this Container's identity / purpose statement. On the root container (manifest.container), names the repository's identity record. Reassignable; when present MUST equal a member id in rootInstanceIds or memberInstanceIds (RFC-013 I-81). RFC-018 additionally requires that on the root container, this MUST reference a Tier-2 Record of type com.semanticops.core/purpose (RFC-018 I-87); for non-root containers this type constraint does not apply. See RFC-013 I-81, RFC-018 R5.

path.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the container file.

containerType.description: Soft-deprecated hint (RFC-009). SHOULD equal the resolved root Type's name field. See RFC-009 I-64.

mode.description: 'local': definitions live in the repository under package/. 'external': definitions are expected pre-installed in the consumer's registry.

path.description: Relative path to the package directory or package.json (local mode).

packageId.description: Stable UUID of the package. For external mode: identifies the upstream package (required per R4a, tool-behavioral, not JSON Schema enforced). For local mode: optional; when set, allows same-logical-package identity check without reading the package manifest file.

packageName.description: Human-readable name of the package (any mode, optional).

packageVersion.description: Semver of the package (both local and external modes). SHOULD be set when the version is known.

path.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the instance file.

RenderedPresentation.description: RFC-015 [N+31]. A declared presentation of this repository: a DocumentView that a conformant viewer should offer as a rendered entry point.

viewId.description: UUID of the DocumentView (DocumentView.id) constituting this presentation. Must resolve to a DocumentView in the active package(s). Resolution conflict across packages is a validation error.

isDefault.description: When true, this is the presentation a viewer opens by default. First isDefault:true entry wins when multiple are present.

format.description: Output format hint for render tooling (e.g. 'markdown', 'html'). Informational only; does not affect viewer selection.

outputPath.description: Relative path hint for rendered export scripts. Informational only; does not affect viewer selection.

UpstreamPackage.description: RFC-014 (ext:import-tracking). Normative provenance stamp recording the upstream Package a repository was initialised from. Set at repository creation time; updated when the upstream Package is upgraded.

packageId.description: Stable UUID of the upstream Package this repository was created from. Never changes across upgrades.

namespace.description: Reverse-DNS namespace of the upstream Package, e.g. 'com.mudemocracy.governance'.

name.description: Name of the upstream Package, e.g. 'governance'.

version.description: Semver of the upstream Package recorded at install/upgrade time, e.g. '1.0.0'.

installedAt.description: When this upstream Package version was installed into the repository.
